title: Create daily_scan.py
description: CLI tool that scans any universe for actionable signals today.

title: Remove not_in_universe exit in Portfolio._rebalance()
description: Delete the for-loop in _rebalance() that exits positions not in current signal list. Positions should only exit on hard stop, profit targets, trailing stop, time stop, or emergency drawdown.

title: Verify the fix — run backtest, lint, compare metrics
description: 1) Run `python backtest.py -u nifty50 --years 3` 2) Verify not_in_universe = 0, CAGR >= baseline 3) Check there are no lint errors
